privileged_info_summary: The weekday_heatmap_matrix task uses a synthetic 1000-row sales dataset (sales_data.csv) covering dates from 2023-01-01 to 2024-01-01 with product categories: Clothing, Electronics, Food, Furniture. The task requires creating a Power BI report named 'Weekday_Heatmap.pbix' containing two calculated columns (Day_Number and Day_Name derived from Sale_Date), a DAX measure (Total_Sales summing Sales_Amount), a Matrix visual with Day_Name as rows and Product_Category as columns, a Card visual, and conditional formatting on the Matrix. The verifier checks for all these elements by examining the output .pbix file structure and data model.
